api_key.description: Giphy API key. Sent as the api_key query parameter on every request; never logged.

base_url.description: Giphy API base URL override for tests or proxies.

query_for_gif.description: Search terms for the gif_search stream (required for that stream).

query_for_stickers.description: Search terms for the sticker_search stream (required for that stream).

query_for_clips.description: Search terms for the clip_search stream (required for that stream).

rating.description: Optional content rating filter (y, g, pg, pg-13, r) applied to every search/trending request.

page_size.description: Records per page (1-50; Giphy caps limit at 50).

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
